presale.connectHeadline: Connect your wallet to get started
presale.confirmPurchaseSubtitle: Choose your path. We'll show progress and a success receipt with links to Etherscan.
presale.pausedMessage: The presale is paused right now. Check back soon for the next round.

howItWorks.title: How it works
steps: Connect your wallet to get started.
Enter the ETH you want to spend to see live token and USD estimates.
Review the totals, confirm in your wallet, and lock today's presale price.
howItWorks.switchNetworkPrompt: Switch to Ethereum Mainnet, then enter how much ETH you want to spend.
howItWorks.pendingPrompt: Approve the transaction in your wallet and watch for the confirmation banner.
howItWorks.successPrompt: Purchase confirmed — your receipt is on Etherscan and staking is available.

pendingMessages.medium: Still pending… Ethereum is a bit busy. Hang tight.
pendingMessages.long: Still pending… the network is busy, but your transaction is queued.

statusCopy.emptyMetrics: Presale metrics will appear once activity starts.

needEth.title: Need ETH for the presale?
needEth.description: Grab ETH from a trusted on-ramp, then send it to the wallet you connect here.
needEth.note: Once your transfer lands, reconnect your wallet and finish the checkout.

emailSignup.successMessage: Thanks! Check your inbox to confirm.
emailSignup.errorMessage: Please enter a valid email address.
emailSignup.label: Email address

faq.description: Quick answers for the curious and the cautious.

items.question: Which wallets can I use?
items.answer: We support MetaMask, WalletConnect, and Coinbase Wallet today. If your wallet isn't listed, connect through WalletConnect or import the account into one of these wallets.

items.question: What does staking do?
items.answer: Staking locks purchased tokens for yield. Flip the Stake after purchase toggle for an automatic deposit or leave it off and stake later from the presale dashboard. Rewards accrue in the same wallet you used to buy.

items.question: When can I claim my tokens?
items.answer: Claiming opens after the presale unlock. We'll notify holders through the dashboard and Telegram. Until then, your purchase receipt and staking rewards remain visible in the widget.
